scripts.smoke:all: npm run check:scripts && npm run check:compose && npm run check:static-safety && npm run check:ai-description-editor && npm run smoke:port-ownership && npm run smoke:prod && npm run smoke:auth-providers && npm run smoke:sms-readiness && npm run smoke:business-profile && npm run smoke:share-og && npm run smoke:public-manifests && npm run smoke:security && npm run smoke:routes && npm run smoke:route-audit && npm run smoke:seo && npm run smoke:cache-headers && npm run smoke:copy && npm run smoke:legal-readiness
scripts.smoke:full: npm run smoke:all && npm run maintenance:precheck
scripts.verify:launch: REQUIRE_SMS_READY=1 REQUIRE_ENV_READY=1 REQUIRE_CATEGORY_DATA_READY=1 REQUIRE_LEGAL_READY=1 npm run smoke:env-readiness && REQUIRE_CATEGORY_DATA_READY=1 npm run smoke:category-data && REQUIRE_LEGAL_READY=1 npm run smoke:legal-readiness && REQUIRE_SMS_READY=1 npm run smoke:all
scripts.gate:prod: npm run check:scripts && npm run check:compose && npm run check:recovery && npm run check:static-safety && npm run check:ai-description-editor && npm run smoke:port-ownership && npm run smoke:auth-providers && npm run smoke:sms-readiness && npm run smoke:business-profile && npm run smoke:share-og && npm run smoke:public-manifests && npm run smoke:cache-headers && npm run build && npm run verify:quick
scripts.check:compose: DB_PASSWORD=${DB_PASSWORD:-ci} REDIS_PASSWORD=${REDIS_PASSWORD:-ci} docker compose config >/tmp/mercasto_compose_base.$(id -u).out && DB_PASSWORD=${DB_PASSWORD:-ci} REDIS_PASSWORD=${REDIS_PASSWORD:-ci} docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.override.yml config >/tmp/mercasto_compose_override.$(id -u).out
